blocks.text: Amanda Golden, VP Finance, Woods LLC
Re: Valuation Analysis for Woods LLC

This letter confirms that {{fact:f:E-2020-001.client}} has engaged Fernhollow Partners LLC to prepare a valuation analysis of Woods LLC. Work begins on {{fact:f:E-2020-001.start}} and runs through delivery of a final report and a readout to your board. We appreciate the confidence this engagement reflects, and we intend to earn it.

The scope is fixed. We will estimate the fair market value of the company using income and market approaches. The work rests on management interviews, the financial statements and supporting schedules your office provides, and our own research into comparable companies and transactions. We will identify the records we need in a single request list at kickoff. We do not opine on legal, tax, or accounting matters. The deliverable is a written valuation report suitable for board use, preceded by a client briefing and regular status reporting along the way.

Sandra Perez, Director, leads the engagement day to day and is your first call. Briana Dennis, Senior Associate, builds the model and drafts the report. Ryan Strong, Analyst, prepares the comparable-company work and ties out the figures. I review the model and the report before either reaches your board.

Our fee for this scope is {{fact:f:E-2020-001.fee}}. The fee is fixed. It covers professional time and routine expenses. Unusual expenses require your written approval before we incur them. Invoices are issued monthly and are payable on receipt. If the scope changes, we will agree on any adjustment in writing before additional work begins.

We will hold your information in confidence. Materials you provide are used only for this engagement and are returned or destroyed at your direction when the work concludes. Our workpapers remain our property.
If these terms are acceptable, please sign below and return one copy to my attention. Questions before then can go to Sandra Perez or to me directly. We are glad to be working with Woods LLC.
